name: Credit for Employment of Qualified Veterans

eligibility.description: Must be a 501(c) organization that hires a qualified veteran as defined in section 51(d)(3).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Qualified tax-exempt organizations can claim a credit against their 6.2% employer OASDI tax for hiring qualified veterans, based on the Work Opportunity Tax Credit (WOTC) rules.
